title: Dol (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dol''' was a male given name. The following individuals were named Dol:
*[[Dol Captison]], a [[Bakuran Senate]] member.
*[[Dol Donar II]], Imperial Governor of [[Derra IV/Legends|Derra IV]].
*[[Dol Grenn]], a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[Telos Security Force]].
*[[Dol Heep]], ambassador.

{{Disambig}}
